name: Ground Meat Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp red and green bell peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a toaster oven tray with cooking spray.
3. Press biscuits onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan to form a crust. Bake for 7 minutes. Remove from oven.
4. Spoon tomato sauce onto partially baked crust.
5. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add chicken, Italian seasoning, pizza seasoning, and garlic powder. Cook until chicken is no longer pink.
6. Spread meat mixture onto the crust. Sprinkle with mushrooms, onions, bell peppers, and cheese.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until crust is brown and cheese has melted.
